pageSubtitle: What if you had invested the same amount in different assets on the same date? Compare multiple assets on a single chart.

form.assetsHint: Add at least 1 asset. If you add multiple, you'll see them side by side on the same chart.
form.modeAmountHint: apply a single amount to all assets

chart.title: Comparison Curve
chart.indexedHint: All assets start from 100 points. Assets of different magnitudes (e.g. a 5 ₺ stock vs 67,000 ₺ BTC) become directly comparable on the same curve.

empty.title: Ready to compare
empty.subtitle: Pick a date and amount, add at least two assets, then click "Compare". The result will appear in this box.
